final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-panel educational knowledge card for children about the 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge-card layout with a clear title at top, bullet-point key facts listed on the side, and a cartoon story scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 narrative: key figures (曹操, 刘备, 孙权, 周瑜, 诸葛亮), the fire attack on 曹操's fleet, the 长江 river battle setting
Scene/backdrop: must include the 长江 river with warships engulfed in flames as the central story scene
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic yet child-friendly warm atmosphere — exact light and mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, child-friendly bright direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface feel — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include title "赤壁之战", side bullet points listing key story beats (人物 / 起因 / 经过 / 结果), labels for major characters
Constraints: must preserve child-appropriate tone throughout; all story elements and bullet points must be clearly readable; card layout must feel like a single cohesive infographic
Avoid:
